sentences.target: J'ai vu le pape à la télé.
sentences.reading: /ʒe vy lə pap a la tele/

translations.fr: J'ai vu le pape à la télé.
translations.ipa: /ʒe vy lə pap a la tele/
translations.en: I saw the Pope on TV.
translations.es: Vi al Papa en la tele.
translations.de: Ich habe den Papst im Fernsehen gesehen.
translations.it: Ho visto il Papa in TV.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在电视上看到了教皇。
translations.vi: Tôi thấy Giáo hoàng trên TV.
translations.nl: Ik heb de paus op tv gezien.
translations.hi: मैंने टीवी पर पोप को देखा.
translations.ro: L-am văzut pe Papă la televizor.
translations.ja: テレビでローマ教皇を見た。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun (1st person singular), elided before a vowel; subject of the auxiliary.
Auxiliary verb in present tense (1st sg) forming the compound past with the past participle.
Past participle functioning as main verb in a compound tense; takes a direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular, determiners the noun 'pape'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'vu'.
Preposition introducing a prepositional phrase indicating medium or location.
Definite article, feminine singular, determiners the noun 'télé'.
Colloquial noun (short for 'télévision'); object of the preposition 'à'.

sentences.target: Ils parlent du pape au journal.

translations.fr: Ils parlent du pape au journal.
translations.en: They're talking about the Pope on the news.
translations.es: Están hablando del Papa en las noticias.
translations.de: In den Nachrichten sprechen sie über den Papst.
translations.it: Stanno parlando del Papa al telegiornale.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们在新闻里谈论教皇。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺新聞度講緊教宗。
translations.pt: Estão falando do Papa no noticiário.
translations.vi: Họ đang nói về Giáo hoàng trên bản tin.
translations.nl: In het nieuws praten ze over de paus.
translations.hi: खबरों में पोप के बारे में बात कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Στις ειδήσεις μιλούν για τον Πάπα.
translations.nb: I nyhetene snakker de om paven.
translations.sv: På nyheterna pratar de om påven.
translations.ro: La știri se vorbește despre Papă.
translations.da: I nyhederne taler de om paven.
translations.ja: ニュースでローマ教皇のことを話している。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 3rd person plural; subject of 'parlent'.
Main verb, present tense (3rd pl). Often used with 'de' to mark topic ('parler de').
Contraction of 'de + le'; preposition introducing the complement 'pape' (topic: about the pope).
Common noun; object of the preposition 'du'.
Contraction of 'à + le'; preposition introducing a location/institution ('journal').
Noun denoting an institution/place; complement of the preposition 'au'.

sentences.target: Tu connais le nom du pape actuel.
sentences.reading: /ty kɔnɛ lə nɔ̃ dy pap aktɥɛl/

translations.fr: Tu connais le nom du pape actuel.
translations.ipa: /ty kɔnɛ lə nɔ̃ dy pap aktɥɛl/
translations.en: You know the name of the current Pope.
translations.es: Sabes el nombre del Papa actual.
translations.de: Du kennst den Namen des aktuellen Papstes.
translations.ko: 너는 현재 교황의 이름을 알고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 你知道现任教皇的名字。
translations.yue: 你識而家嗰位教宗嘅名。
translations.pt: Você sabe o nome do Papa atual.
translations.he: אתה יודע את שמו של האפיפיור הנוכחי.
translations.vi: Bạn biết tên của Giáo hoàng hiện tại.
translations.nl: Je kent de naam van de huidige paus.
translations.hi: तुम वर्तमान पोप का नाम जानते हो.
translations.el: Ξέρεις το όνομα του σημερινού Πάπα.
translations.nb: Du vet navnet på den nåværende paven.
translations.id: Kamu tahu nama Paus saat ini.
translations.sv: Du vet namnet på den nuvarande påven.
translations.da: Du kender navnet på den nuværende pave.
translations.ja: 今のローマ教皇の名前を知っている。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of 'connais'.
Main verb, present tense (2nd sg), transitive; takes direct object 'le nom du pape actuel'.
Definite article, masculine singular, determiners the noun 'nom'.
Common noun; direct object of 'connais'.
Contraction of 'de + le'; preposition introducing a noun complement ('nom du pape').
Common noun; complement of 'du' within the noun phrase.
Adjective modifying 'pape'; post-nominal, indicates present holder.

sentences.target: On attend le pape devant la cathédrale.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ atɑ̃ lə pap dəvɑ̃ la katedʁal/

translations.fr: On attend le pape devant la cathédrale.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ atɑ̃ lə pap dəvɑ̃ la katedʁal/
translations.en: We're waiting for the Pope in front of the cathedral.
translations.es: Estamos esperando al Papa frente a la catedral.
translations.de: Wir warten vor der Kathedrale auf den Papst.
translations.it: Aspettiamo il Papa davanti alla cattedrale.
translations.ko: 우리는 대성당 앞에서 교황을 기다리고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在大教堂前等教皇。
translations.yue: 我哋喺大教堂前面等緊教宗。
translations.pt: Estamos esperando o Papa em frente à catedral.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang chờ Giáo hoàng trước nhà thờ chính tòa.
translations.nl: We wachten op de paus voor de kathedraal.
translations.hu: A székesegyház előtt várjuk a pápát.
translations.hi: हम कैथेड्रल के सामने पोप का इंतजार कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Περιμένουμε τον Πάπα μπροστά στον καθεδρικό ναό.
translations.nb: Vi venter på paven foran katedralen.
translations.id: Kami menunggu Paus di depan katedral.
translations.sv: Vi väntar på påven framför katedralen.
translations.ro: Îl așteptăm pe Papă în fața catedralei.
translations.da: Vi venter på paven foran katedralen.
translations.ja: 大聖堂の前でローマ教皇を待っている。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun (often colloquial 'we'); subject of 'attend'.
Main verb, present tense (3rd sg); transitive, taking direct object 'le pape'.
Definite article, masculine singular, determiners the noun 'pape'.
Common noun; direct object of 'attend'.
Preposition indicating spatial location; introduces the prepositional phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular, determiners the noun 'cathédrale'.
Common noun; complement of the preposition 'devant'.
